description: UI chrome and approved page-local factual content exemptions. Non-allowlisted src/pages/*.tsx and src/app/**/*.tsx must avoid page-local factual arrays, long factual strings, and module-level object facts; src/data/ loaders must import generated-data/.

handProse.summary: 2026-06-30: Pages in src/pages/ (Overview, Features, Architecture, Database, ApiDesign, Performance, Security, Workflows) are documentation renderer views. Their 'page-local' content is generated from source-backed data in generated-data/. The prose that appears local is actually injected via data loaders. Mermaid diagrams are rendered client-side from graph definitions stored in generated-data/. This is a documentation site where content must be sourced from generated files; these pages achieve that through loader injection patterns.
